content.uploadFilesSelectTitle: Choose an electronic health record (EHR) to upload
uploadFilesBulletPoints: The file must be in PDF format
You need to convert your file to PDF if it's not one already
Remove any password protection from the file
If there is a problem with your file during upload, you'll need to resolve it before continuing
content.confirmFilesTitle: Check file is for the correct patient
content.beforeYouUploadTitle: Before you upload the EHR summary
content.skipDocumentLinkText: Continue without uploading an EHR summary
